title: Don't Hide Bundles
description: Uncaps the bundle display and selection limit
body:
# Don't Hide Bundles
Uncaps the bundle display and selection limit

The Vanilla limit is **12**, this mod uncaps it to always show all items

Client side only, but works on most servers!

# Images
![demo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/P3nguinMinecraft/DontHideBundles/refs/heads/1.21.2/imgs/demo.png)
